title: Tuning Variables in Ethanol-Water Separation Efficiency
author: Moure Abelenda, Alejandro
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Preliminary work with the distillation collumn UOP3 of Armfield Ltd for the separation of the non-ideal mixture of ethanol and water. Tunning of the variables (boild-up rate, heating power, reflux ratio) to enhance the separation efficiency. Similar procedure should be applied for the direct isolation of ammonium bicarbonate for the tradiational batch distillation setup.
